---
title: ""
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

## École de l'Air et de l'Espace (since 2025)

- Python programming (BSc level)
- Object-oriented programming (BSc level)
- Cybersecurity (BSc and MSc level)
- Agile methods (BSc level)
- Machine learning (MSc level)

## Université Clermont Auvergne - BUT Data Science (2019-2025)

- Cryptography (BSc level)
- Databases: relational and NoSQL (BSc level)
- Statistical programming (BSc level)
- Data mining (BSc level)
- Statistical studies and survey methods (BSc level)
- Database security (BSc level)
- Introduction to cybersecurity (BSc level)
